_comment: [wave:s19/k2-w4-coverage-ratchet-75] Sprint 6 K3 [wave:s6/k3-coverage-gate-70] baseline. Coverage gate threshold ratchet: 70% → 75% (S19 K2 W4). Actual coverage ~59% (2026-05). Raise to 75% is a future target requiring targeted test additions. CI gate uses --threshold 75 (updated from 50).
